meaning: n.牡鹿,阉割过的雄鹿,刚长大的雄家禽,不带女伴的舞客,只有男性的社交晚会vi.不带女伴参加晚会adj.全是男人的
examples: He's seen a pair of antlers, and he's turning into a stag.
His genes will live on, and perhaps we'll see an even greater Exmoor stag.
I was hiding behind a low bush, waiting for some animal to pass when this large stag appeared.
But going away for a stag weekend doesn't necessarily mean buying a pre-set package.
There were rumours flying around about a stag do but it is not true.
